pi_items.source: Analyzed setup_task.sh and cytochrome_c_multispecies.fasta which explicitly target and include the real UniProt Cytochrome c sequence P99999.
Analyzed setup_task.sh and hemoglobin_beta_multispecies.fasta which programmatically inject exactly these 8 real UniProt Hemoglobin beta sequences.
Verified output path defined in setup_task.sh.
Verified output directory structure in setup_task.sh and export_result.sh.

privileged_info_summary: The task programmatically synthesizes a mixed FASTA dataset containing 8 authentic Hemoglobin beta sequences (P68871, P02088, P02112, P02132, Q90485, P02070, P02062, P02067) and 1 Cytochrome c contaminant (P99999) extracted from local UniProt FASTA assets. The initial generated dataset resides in `/home/ga/UGENE_Data/qc_analysis/mixed_protein_sequences.fasta`, and expected artifacts should be generated in `/home/ga/UGENE_Data/qc_analysis/results`.
